title: Verify valid login with standard_user
expected_result: User is redirected to /inventory.html and products page is displayed

title: Verify error message for invalid credentials
expected_result: Error message 'Username and password do not match' is displayed

title: Verify products inventory page displays 6 items
steps: Count the number of product cards on the inventory page
expected_result: Exactly 6 product cards are visible, each with name, price, and Add to Cart button

title: Verify add to cart increments badge
steps: Click 'Add to cart' on the first product

title: Verify product sort by price low to high
steps: Check the price of the first and last product
expected_result: First product has the lowest price; products are in ascending price order

title: Verify checkout completes successfully
steps: Enter first name 'Test', last name 'User', zip '12345'
expected_result: Confirmation page shows 'Thank you for your order!'

title: Verify checkout validation for missing first name
steps: Add a product to cart and proceed to checkout
expected_result: Error message 'First Name is required' is displayed

title: Verify logout redirects to login page
expected_result: User is redirected to the login page at https://www.saucedemo.com/

title: Verify cart item removal decrements badge
expected_result: Cart badge shows '1' after removing one of two items
